docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; CASE SETTLED. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS. HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-17-2016 AT 1:30 PM. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS. THE CASE SETTLES IN THE COURTROOM. HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: M.L.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, KELSEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, KELSEY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-17-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANKIE THOMAS--QUALITY ASSURANCE ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $372.50 SERVED DEC-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PLACEK, KELSEY
